dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm doing all right! Doing all right! All right!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: So many dangers all throughout these Fields. Yet here on this bridge, I feel a sense of comfort. Even peace. It's because of your presence and your power...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Your presence and your power... presence and power... presence and power...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Closer to Cerberus... Cerberus... Cerberus...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: You know him? Massive triple-headed monster elsewhere in these Fields. He's not supposed to be here, and it's made him very angry, poor dog.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Angry poor dog... angry poor dog... poor dog... poor dog.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Good evening to you! Evening to you! Evening to you!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: You know, you're never around when the Boatman Charon's in the area. Fear not, for he's a friend. Though, not always easy to talk to.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Always easy to talk to... easy to talk to... to talk to...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Barely made it this far... made it this far... made it this far...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Yes, Echo. Please don't tell anyone, but... I come from Erebus, all the way across the outskirts of the Underworld. I seek the House of Hades... to slay the usurper of the throne.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: ...usurper of the throne... slay the usurper of the throne... slay the usurper...

endLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
endLines.text: Even knowing, you still support me.

endLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
endLines.text: You still support me... support me... support me...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: A welcome sight... a welcome sight... a welcome sight...!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I know you didn't always speak this way... without the full use of your voice. But you possess such strength, despite the change. My words, perhaps, but the intent is yours.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: ...My words... but the intent is yours... my words... but the intent is yours...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Don't give in... don't give in... don't give in...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I'm still amazed you spoke to me last time, Echo. In words of your own choosing, I mean! It was wonderful to hear from you, however briefly... perhaps we have the makings of a cure.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: The makings of a cure... of a cure... of a cure...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Are you back...?  Are you back...? Are you back...?

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I am... and so are you. No more Ambrosia then, and... all these Shades nearby... you're helping them, aren't you? To work through their sorrow.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Work through their sorrow... their sorrow... their sorrow...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I'm glad... a lot of Shades likely could use your aid. It seems like it must be a difficult job, but a rewarding one.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: A rewarding one... rewarding one... rewarding one...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Who are you, may I ask? May I ask? May I ask?

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Well I can sense you're of no danger to me, so... I am Melinoë. Family business down in Tartarus. And you are...? Do I hear an echo?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: I am... Echo! Echo! Echo! Echo!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Hello... my friend... my friend... my friend...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I always thought... these Fields of Mourning, they were just a place for falling deep into despair. But you really have been getting better here?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Getting better here... better here... better here...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Well... I know it's difficult to seek for aid, but... if there's anything that I can do, I'm here for you, all right?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: All right... I'm here for you... all right, I'm here for you...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Poor thing... poor thing... poor thing...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I wish I knew what you were doing in a place like this. Though, you can't just tell me can you? Your heart must have been broken...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Must have been broken... heart broken... heart broken...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Is that you? Is that you? Is that you?

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: It's me all right, Echo. I don't know how come you've been assisting me, but I'm a long way from home and could use all the help I can get going farther.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Help going farther... going farther... going farther...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: A gathering of Shades... gathering of Shades... gathering of Shades...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: They're here to see you, aren't they? Thank you for consoling them... for bringing them a sense of peace.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: A sense of peace... a sense of peace... a sense of peace...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Remember this place... remember this place... remember this place...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: How could I ever forget it? And I think Hecuba here remembers, too. She seems to recognize you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Recognize you... recognize you... recognize you...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Your Concave Stone! Your Concave Stone! Your Concave Stone!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: It's a beautiful gift. It must have come from the mountains where you used to reside. Do you ever miss it? I can't imagine you prefer it here...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Imagine you prefer it here... prefer it here... prefer it here...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: How have you been? How have you been? How have you been?

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Oh, you know. This place sure is a change from Oceanus, if you've ever been. About the only friendly face up there is that Narcissus...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Is that Narcissus... that Narcissus... that Narcissus...!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Wait, your voice... you know him? Oh, no. Knowing all his suitors, and knowing you're here in the land of the broken-hearted...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Broken-hearted... broken-hearted... broken-hearted...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Think he's sorry... he's sorry... he's sorry...?

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: He had no idea what happened to you. But he remembers you! And he didn't mean to hurt you. So please don't take it personally. I think he only loves himself.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: He only loves himself... only loves himself... only loves himself...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: About Narcissus...? About Narcissus... about Narcissus...!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I don't know what he was like back when you met, but he has a certain vanity about him that... perhaps dulls his other senses a bit. When we speak, it's often like I'm not even there.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm not even there... not even there... not even there...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: I wanted to say... wanted to say... wanted to say...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: It's really nothing, but... a, erm, wise fellow with a very keen sense of self-worth once told me... I hope you find someone who loves you like I love myself.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Like I love myself... I love myself... love myself...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Glad you're here! Glad you're here! Glad you're here!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I spoke with Narcissus again. I'm certain that... he really wants what's best for you. How could he not? Among the countless souls here, you're so generous and sweet.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_02
dialogueLines.text: So generous and sweet... and sweet... and sweet...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: All alone this time... alone this time... this time...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: How was your meeting with Narcissus? I'm glad he was decent enough to pay you a visit. I know it must have hurt, but... I hope it helped to see him again.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: It helped to see him again... helped to see him again... to see him again.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: I have to talk to you... to talk to you... to talk to you...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I was able to assist Narcissus with a certain plight. And you seem to have let go of him yourself. But as for you... the way you are... I sense that you don't ever want to change.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_02
dialogueLines.text: ...don't ever want to change, I... don't ever want to change... I don't ever want to change...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: We each are cursed with our experiences. I am nothing without mine. Thank you for reflecting my thoughts and sharing your feelings, Echo. But are you all right to remain here?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_02
dialogueLines.text: All right to remain here... all right to remain here... all right to remain...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Message for me, Mel? Message for me, Mel? Message for me, Mel?

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Why, yes! I saw Narcissus again recently, and he wanted me to tell you he said hi. For what it's worth, I think he's genuinely hoping that the two of you can still be friends.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Can still be friends... still be friends... be friends...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: You've grown past your prior feelings for him. Though, you don't mind if he still visits you now and again, do you? If he can tear himself away from his reflection...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: If he can tear himself away... tear himself away... tear himself away...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: There she is... there she is... there she is...!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: You must have hidden back when Nemesis was here. Big dark-haired daughter of Nyx that sometimes storms through these Fields? But you don't have to be afraid of her.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: ...afraid of her... don't have to be afraid of her... don't be afraid of her...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, it's Melinoë! It's Melinoë! Melinoë!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: It's Echo! Echo! Echo! You're an Oread, aren't you? Though you're not speaking in the customary way of Mountain Nymphs... some sort of curse?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Some sort of curse... sort of curse... curse... curse...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: It's been too long! Too long! Too long!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Yes... for I have matters not just in the depths of Tartarus, but also far above... on the besieged summit of Olympus. Rightful home of Lord Zeus and Queen Hera.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Zeus and Queen Hera... Queen Hera... Queen Hera...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Echo... Echo... Echo...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Hi... Hi... Hi...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Hello...! Hello...! Hello...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: How've you been... you been... you been...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Me again... me again... me again...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: All right... all right... all right...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: ...help... I can help... I can help...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: I can help you... help you... help you...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Pleased to see you... see you... see you...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Echo, it's you... it's you... it's you...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Thank the Fates... thank the Fates... thank the Fates...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: A cheerful sight... cheerful sight... cheerful sight!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Hellooo! Hellooo! Hellooo!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Echo...! Echo...! Echo...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Have to press on... press on... press on...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Close to Tartarus... to Tartarus... to Tartarus...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Feeling wonderful tonight! Wonderful tonight! Wonderful tonight!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: ...Echo... don't you despair... Echo... don't you despair...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: You're not alone... not alone... not alone.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: You're looking well...! Looking well...! Looking well...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Moonlight guide you... guide you... guide you...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Just passing through... passing through... passing through...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: You're not alone... not alone... not alone...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Let's keep going... keep going... keep going...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: A friendly face... a friendly face... a friendly face...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: What's new... what's new... what's new...?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Hello again... hello again... hello again...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: From Olympus... from Olympus... from Olympus...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: I mean you no harm. You no harm. No harm. No harm.

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: That makes two of us. What ails you, Shade? Is there something I could do to ease your burden?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: I could ease your burden? Your burden? Your burden?

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Even in a place of sorrow such as this, there's beauty... gentleness. I know not how to ease your burden yet, though perhaps this will help.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Perhaps this will help... this will help... this will help...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: It means a lot to see your gentle face! May this Nectar sweeten your time here. Look how vast these Fields are! Plenty of room for more than just sorrow.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: More than just sorrow... just sorrow... just sorrow...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I have more Nectar for you, Echo, if you please! Where I am from, it's a small gift we offer those we care about. I don't know about you, but even just handing over this stuff, I feel a bit better.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: I feel a bit better... bit better... bit better...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I suppose not even Nectar is enough to lift the mood here. Though you're surrounded by stone monuments at least. If you're from the mountains, perhaps it's like being at home.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: It's like being at home... like being at home... like being at home...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Please let me know somehow if there is anything I could get you or do for you one of these nights. At least it seems safe here. For now, I hope this Nectar is enough.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: This Nectar is enough... is enough... is enough...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Thank you for reminding me just how much can be said using few words or even none at all. When you respond, the words may be mine, but I know what you mean. And I know you understand me, too.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: You understand me, too... understand me, too... you understand...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: As we've grown to know each other more, Echo, I wanted to get you something special if you're up for it. This is Ambrosia, from the tallest peaks of Mount Olympus.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: The tallest peaks of Mount Olympus... peaks of Mount Olympus... the tallest peaks of, I... ngh...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Echo! Did you just...? You said something! You said I, in your own words! I know I heard you say it!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: ...heard you say it... I... I know, I hear you, and... I thank you. This Ambrosia, it's... it's doing this for me, I think, but I... but I... but I... don't think that it will last for long... for long...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Then I shall get more! Echo, this is amazing! I knew Ambrosia could be good, but not this good!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Not this good... not this, guh... this is hard for me to explain, but... I don't need any... don't need any... don't need any...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Echo, what happened...? The Ambrosia. You don't need anymore for now...? It was too much...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: It was too much... too much... too much...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: All right, Echo, we need to sort this out. It must have been Ambrosia that gave you back your voice last time, so perhaps it shall work again. Is it doing anything?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Is it doing anything...? Doing anything... anything, is it... I... I, Melinoë, look. Look, I haven't stayed here because I need help... need help... need help...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Echo, it's you! Then, what do you need? I don't understand. Who would wish to wallow in a place like this?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: A place like... this is where I can help... I can help... I can help... others, who... have no one to talk to. To turn to. Because I found... I can reflect their feelings, and their thoughts... and their thoughts... and their thoughts...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: The way that you've reflected mine. But, we have to find a way to give you back your voice. We're close to a breakthrough!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: A breakthrough... a break... no. No, back when I could speak... like this... like this... like this... I couldn't hear myself or others. Not like now. So please... I already have what I want, I promise you... I promise you... I promise...

endLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
endLines.text: Echo... I... I see. And... I understand.

endLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
endLines.text: I understand... I understand... I understand...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Tough out there... tough out there... tough out there...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: That it is. No matter how many times I pass through these Fields, I have to fight back a sense of despair. At least till I get here, since you always have something good.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Have something good... something good... something good...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Just a little farther... little farther... little farther...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Thank you for the encouragement, Echo. It can be such a struggle getting through this place. But you seem to manage, in your own way.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Manage, in your own way... in your own way... your own way...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: The Nymph I wished to see...! I wished to see...! I wished to see...!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I confess I'm in a pretty sorry state right now, Echo. But I know if I can make it this far, your blessings may be just the thing to let me go the rest of the way.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: ...rest of the way... go the rest of the way... go...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: We did it...! We did it...! We did it...!

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: The House of Hades is restored! The Underworld King and Queen won't let this place languish as it has...! In time, I'm certain it shall be better here for everyone.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Better here for everyone... for everyone... for everyone...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Yes. But for now, I may continue passing through much like before. I have to visit Tartarus to ensure everything's all right.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Everything's all right... all right... all right...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Narcissus! Narcissus! Narcissus!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Narcissus_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh hey, um, Echo and I, we were just catching up a bit, I guess. It's been a while! Forgot how much I loved the Fields! Isn't this great?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_02
dialogueLines.text: Isn't this great? Isn't this great? Isn't this great?

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: I'm pleased to see you here, the both of you! The energy feels completely different than usual — in a good way! Echo, erm... I hope that everything's OK?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_02
dialogueLines.text: Everything's OK? Everything's OK! Everything's OK.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Narcissus_01
dialogueLines.text: ...So anyways, I guess what I am trying to say is, um... I, I didn't mean for you to end up here, you know? But I get that you did! Ungh! I don't want you to hate me.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Don't want you to hate me... to hate me... hate me...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Narcissus_01
dialogueLines.text: But I don't hate you! You're a great conversationalist, great listener — which I don't mean romantically, just to be clear — but just... oh man. I'm a dummy... and I'm sorry too, OK?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: OK... I'm sorry, too... OK, I'm sorry, too.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Narcissus_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh you don't have to say that! But I'm glad you feel the same way. So like maybe... we can still be friends?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: We can still be friends...? Still be friends...? Be friends...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Narcissus_01
dialogueLines.text: Nice! And by the way I like this bridge!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: I like this bridge... this bridge... this bridge.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Narcissus_01
dialogueLines.text: Looks like you've put down roots here, huh? Pretty nice spot! The River Styx right over there, the rustle of the wheat...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Rustle of the wheat... rustle of the wheat... rustle of the wheat...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Narcissus_01
dialogueLines.text: Yeah, kind of like back when we were up top! The trees, the flowers, and all that. You ever miss those times?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Ever miss those times? Miss those times? Miss those times?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Narcissus_01
dialogueLines.text: Well personally not so much, I guess. I mean, look at all this! I'd say we have it pretty good!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: We have it pretty good! Pretty good! Pretty good!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Narcissus_01
dialogueLines.text: What's going on? Just catching up with Echo over here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Echo over here... Echo over here... Echo over here...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Narcissus_01
dialogueLines.text: It sure is nice around here in these Fields don't you think?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Don't you think? Don't you think? Don't you think?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Narcissus_01
dialogueLines.text: I can't see me right now though I do get to see the both of you!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: The both of you! The both of you! The both of you!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Narcissus_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm looking good, you're looking good, we're all looking good.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: All looking good... all looking good... all looking good...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Narcissus_01
dialogueLines.text: No gifts on me right now but I think Echo got you something!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Got you something! Got you something! Got you something!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Narcissus_01
dialogueLines.text: I know I'm looking positively great. I'm saying so are you!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: So are you! So are you! So are you!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Narcissus_01
dialogueLines.text: ...Hey, can't we both be the best? We're both the best!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: Both the best! Both the best! Both the best!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Narcissus_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, we were just talking about you! Echo, it's our friend!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Echo_01
dialogueLines.text: It's our friend! It's our friend! It's our friend!
